script: APP_ID=ce03d8ce-5306-48cc-bd4f-9370d7005e15; echo '===== Existing SP for this app? =====' && az ad sp show --id $APP_ID 2>&1 | head -20 || true; echo; echo '===== Attempt to create service principal =====' && az ad sp create --id $APP_ID 2>&1 | head -40; echo; echo '===== Verify SP now exists =====' && az ad sp show --id $APP_ID --query '{id, displayName, appOwnerOrganizationId}' 2>&1 | head -20; echo; echo '===== Try BF token AGAIN =====' && TENANT=50186224-2255-444a-b321-60a84114115c; SECRET=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name aixa-bot-client-secret --query value -o tsv); curl -s -X POST "https://login.microsoftonline.com/$TENANT/oauth2/v2.0/token" --data-urlencode "client_id=$APP_ID" --data-urlencode "client_secret=$SECRET" --data-urlencode 'grant_type=client_credentials' --data-urlencode 'scope=https://api.botframework.com/.default' | jq '{has_token: (.access_token != null), token_type, expires_in, error, error_description: (.error_description // "" | .[:200])}' 2>&1
